candidate_definition_hints.text: A Heroku buildpack for building Phoenix's static assets

This buildpack is meant to be used with the [Heroku Buildpack for Elixir](https://github.com/HashNuke/heroku-buildpack-elixir). When deploying Phoenix apps to Heroku, static assets will need to be compiled. This buildpack sees to it that static assets are compiled and that a cor…
